name: Bartact
tagline: Made-in-USA tactical seat covers and accessories — direct from the manufacturer
product_range: Tactical seat covers, paracord grab handles, MOLLE accessories, limit straps, sun visors
review: Bartact is what happens when a manufacturer cuts out the middleman and sells directly to enthusiasts. Based in Temecula, California, Bartact designs and manufactures tactical-grade seat covers, grab handles, and accessories right here in the USA. Their materials are serious — UV-protected polyester, 1000-denier Cordura, foam-and-scrim backing, and double or triple stitching throughout. Every cover is SRS airbag compatible. They're Berry Amendment compliant, which means they meet U.S. military procurement standards. Their Jeep seat cover collection is arguably the best on the market, and their paracord grab handles — which they originally invented — have been copied by dozens of competitors but never matched in quality. If you want the best and you want to buy direct, Bartact is the move.

name: GenRight Off Road
tagline: Premium fabricated off-road armor and suspension from Southern California
product_range: Roll cages, tube fenders, bumpers, skid plates, suspension, axle housings
review: GenRight is the kind of manufacturer that makes other companies nervous. Based in SoCal, they design and fabricate some of the most respected off-road armor, fenders, and suspension components on the market. Everything is made in-house from American steel and aluminum, and the fit and finish is consistently excellent. Their tube fenders and aluminum body panels are especially popular in the Jeep community. If you're doing a serious trail build, GenRight's catalog is worth studying.

name: Rigid Industries
tagline: The LED lighting brand that started the off-road lighting revolution
product_range: LED light bars, spot/flood lights, scene lighting, marine lighting
review: Rigid Industries essentially created the off-road LED light bar category. Their products are engineered and assembled in the USA, and they back everything with a lifetime warranty. The D-Series, E-Series, and Radiance lines cover everything from rock lights to 50-inch roof bars. Are they cheap? No. But the optical engineering, thermal management, and build quality justify the premium. If you've ever been on a night trail behind someone with Rigid lights, you know the difference.

name: Warn Industries
tagline: The undisputed king of winches since 1948
product_range: Winches, bumpers, mounting systems, recovery accessories
review: When people say "winch," they usually mean Warn — that's how dominant this brand is. Founded in 1948, Warn has been building recovery equipment longer than most off-road companies have existed. The ZEON and VR EVO series are industry standards, and their newer electric winches offer impressive power-to-weight ratios. They've expanded into bumpers and mounting systems, but winches remain their core competency and their reputation is bulletproof.
